div.div: System Overview · vault-context as the shared IPC hub between Mayor (Claude Web) and Worker (Claude Code)
run code · touch vault · exec shell
Git push = send · Git pull = receive
Mac Mini M4 · macOS 15.5 · Apple Silicon
vault-context is a shared message bus between Mayor and Worker — two AI systems that can't talk directly. Git push = send. Git pull = receive. Every file in the repo is a structured message.
Planning (Mayor) and execution (Worker) are intentionally isolated. Mayor can't run code or touch the vault. Worker can't create plans or change architecture. Each does only what it's built for.
Brady controls via phone (Discord commands: !resume, !answer) or browser (claude.ai). Checkpoint signals create natural pause points. Brady is never locked out and can intervene at any phase.
Worker runs independently through plan phases. STATE.md is always current — the heartbeat checks every 120s. A 4-hour idle nudge ensures Brady stays in the loop without manual polling.
Mayor System · Sheet 1 of 5 · System Overview
